name: Amara T.
text: I've been wearing my Color Theory beads for three months now and I receive compliments every single week. The quality is unmatched and the intention behind each bead makes me feel so grounded and feminine every day. Body Favors is the real deal!

name: Kezia M.
text: Ordered three strands and they were packaged so beautifully. The beads are high quality — sturdy thread, gorgeous colors. I love that each color has meaning. It makes wearing them feel like a ritual of self-love.

name: Destiny R.
text: First time ordering waist beads and I'm obsessed! The how-to-tie video on the website made it so easy. My beads haven't slipped once. Shipping was fast and the note in the package made me feel so special. 10/10.

name: Nichelle B.
text: I bought the Gold Rush strand for my birthday and it is absolutely stunning. The gold and champagne beads catch the light so beautifully. I feel like royalty every day. This brand truly understands the assignment.

name: Zora W.
text: The fan I purchased is a work of art. The colors are vibrant and the craftsmanship is impeccable. I used it at a photoshoot and it was the star of every frame. Fast shipping and the packaging felt so luxurious.

name: Monique D.
text: Been a loyal customer for over a year. Every order is consistent — beautiful beads, fast shipping, and that little affirmation card is everything. I've gifted Body Favors beads to my sister, my best friend, and my mom. We're all bead squad now!

name: Jade A.
text: I ordered the self-care bundle during a rough patch and it arrived like a gift from the universe. The African net sponge, the beads, and the affirmation card together felt like a whole ritual. Thank you for pouring so much love into these products.

name: Faith O.
text: I'm a plus-size woman and I was nervous about sizing, but the 50-inch strand fit perfectly with room to spare. The beads look absolutely gorgeous on my melanin skin. I cried happy tears when I put them on. Body Favors sees us!
